programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Killer Instinct : In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Killer Abroad : Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Tracks of a Killer : From California to Kentucky, few living near a railroad felt safe in the summer of 1999. A serial killer, rode the rails, picking towns and victims at random. He left behind a trail of bloodshed, but no trace of where he would turn up next.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Killing Spree : In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Firefight : In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Dixie Mafia : On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Atlanta Prison Riot : In the 1980's the federal penitentiary in Atlanta held some of the country's most notorious prisoners. Castro called them undesirables. The U.S. government called them detainees. In 1987 they staged a bloody revolt.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Held Hostage : When a bank teller arrived at her parent's home the gunmen were already there. The robbers held her family hostage and forced her to empty a bank vault. If she didn't comply she could lose everyone she loved.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Criminal Enterprise : Caught in the act, a disguised bank robber hurled explosives at police and disappeared in a hail of bullets. When police identified the suspect, they connected him to an armed kidnapping, but they couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hunter's Game : In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Fateful Crossing : When the victim of a violent crime is a member of law enforcement, the job of investigating becomes personal. At a United States border crossing, armed fugitives kidnapped a customs' inspector then vanished.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Payout : In 1980 the FBI faced the largest explosive device they had ever seen. The bomb was sophisticated, carefully constructed, and designed to destroy an entire building.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Without Mercy : Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Terror For Sale : In the 1980s the drug trade ravaged Chicago's inner city neighborhoods. Heroin and cocaine sales soared. Violent crime threatened to destroy the community.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Short Fuse : Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which was mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bloodlust : For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Partners In Crime : They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Marked For Death : Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Infallible Witness : Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental brain fingerprinting technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bodies of Evidence : It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drawing Conclusions : A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forsaken Trust : When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fatal Impressions : 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Seeds of Destruction : Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At Close Range : When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A Federal Offense : When there's a difficult case to crack whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Camera Clues : Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Women Who Kill : Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.desc: Oil Land : When a rancher discovers oil on his property, he is shot dead by one of his greedy workers. Cisco and Pancho are accused of the murder.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid

programme.title: The Cisco Kid

programme.desc: The Second Wave : Eddie must come to terms with his past when he confronts a gang of "surf rats" lead by a former friend from his reform school days. Trevor begins to doubt his lifeguarding skill when his girlfriend almost drowns because of his arrogance.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Panic at Malibu Pier : Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: In Deep : Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Heat Wave : During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Second Wave : Eddie must come to terms with his past when he confronts a gang of "surf rats" lead by a former friend from his reform school days. Trevor begins to doubt his lifeguarding skill when his girlfriend almost drowns because of his arrogance.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: White Wedding, Pt. 2 : Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Careless Whisper : Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Hot For Teacher : When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Message in a Bottle : Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Relax : Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dressed in Black : Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fight For Your Right : Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: How Soon is Now? : After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tears Are Not Enough, Pt. 1 : It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tears Are Not Enough, Pt. 2 : Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Father Figure, Pt. 1 : The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Father Figure, Pt. 2 : The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: U Got the Look : Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pride, Pt. 1 : Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Happy Chinese New Year! : Happy Chinese New Year!: It's Chinese New Year, which means a big feast, red envelopes, and friends and family all together! Kai-lan and her friends are thrilled because this year, they are old enough to carry the huge dragon costume.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Ni Hao, Halloween : Ni Hao, Halloween: Trick or treat, it's Halloween! Kai-lan and her friends dress up to go trick or treating with Ye-Ye. Kai-lan is a dinosaur, Tolee's a panda, Hoho's the Monkey King, and Rintoo is his favorite – a dragon!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Beach Day : Beach Day: Kai-lan is excited because today she's going to the beach with Ye-Ye and her friends, to play in the sand, fly kites, and go in the water!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Roller Rintoo : Roller Rintoo: Kai-lan and her friends are off to a roller rink to go skating! But when Rintoo won't put on his roller skates, Kai-lan thinks something is wrong. It turns out that Rintoo is scared of roller skating.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Rain or Shine : Rain or Shine: Kai-lan and her friends are planning a big day of playing outdoors, when suddenly it starts to rain! Kai-lan happily finds a way to play in the rain, but Rintoo, Tolee and Hoho are very upset because of the rain.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan's Carnival : Ni Hao Kai-lan: Kai-lan and her friends wake up early today because...there's a CARNIVAL in the backyard with game booths, prizes and rides!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Lulu Day : Lulu Day: Today, Kai-lan is having a playdate with her best girl friend, Lu-lu the rhino! Kai-lan is ready with all sorts of games and things to play with Lu-lu. But Lu-lu wants to play with DIFFERENT things than Kai-lan.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca Redux : Sam tries to get Rebecca back at Cheers after she takes another job.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Where Nobody Knows Your Name : Rebecca's miffed when Robin's ex tells the press that she's his true love.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Ma Always Liked You Best : Woody lets Ma Clavin move into Woody's apartment, much to Cliff's chagrin.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Grease : Norm fights to save his favorite hangout from getting demolished.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Breaking In Is Hard To Do : Rebecca plans a surprise visit to her prison bound love, Robin.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: 200th Anniversary Show (Part 1) : In this very special celebration of "Cheers"' 200th show, Shelley Long rejoins the rest of the gang for a unique look back at the past eight years in part one of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: 200th Anniversary Show (Part 2) : In this very special celebration of "Cheers"' 200th show, Shelley Long rejoins the rest of the gang for a unique look back at the past eight years in part two of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bad Neighbor Sam : Sam loses his cool when a restaurateur takes over the poolroom and restrooms.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Veggie-Boyd : Woody promotes a horrible vegetable drink on his first commercial appearance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm And Cliff's Excellent Adventure : Cliff and Norm's practical joking put Sam and Frasier at odds with each other.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody Interruptus : Woody's gripped with fear of losing Kelly when she returns with a Frenchman.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Honor Thy Mother : Carla resists her mother's dying wish of renaming her son Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Achilles Hill : Sam gets revenge on restaurateur John Allen Hill by dating his daughter.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Days Of Wine And Neuroses : Rebecca reveals her true feelings about Sam when Robin proposes.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Wedding Bell Blues : Sam tries to stop Rebecca's from marrying Robin after she confesses her feelings.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: I'm Getting My Act Together And Sticking It In Your Face : Sam inadvertently leaves a message on Rebecca's machine that he loves her.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam Time Next Year : Sam injures his back while on his annual Valentine's Day date with his old flame.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Crash Of The Titans : Sam and Rebecca try to buy the bar's poolroom and restrooms from John Allen Hill. In the end, Rebecca pays for the majority of the cost, in exchange for part ownership of Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: It's A Wonderful Wife : Norm's wife takes a job at the restaurant above Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cheers Has Chili : Woody increases traffic at Cheers by selling his famous chili.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla Loves Clavin : Cliff poses as a judge in the Miss Barmaid contest to win Carla's favor.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Pitch It Again, Sam : Sam plans to strike out an old baseball rival at a charity game.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rat Girl : Frasier fears Lilith is losing her mind when she's overcome with grief over the death of one of her laboratory rats.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Home Malone : Sam locks himself out of the house while babysitting for Lilith and Frasier's son.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Uncle Sam Wants You : Sam embarks on a search for a suitable mother to have his baby.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Baby Balk : Sam and Rebecca seek psychiatric help for getting in the mood.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Get Your Kicks On Route 666 : The guys of Cheers get stranded when they take a road trip on Route 66.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Madame LaCarla : Carla's psychic asks her to take over her spiritual reading business.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Hummels et héroïne : Des artistes adorés sont fauchés en pleine jeunesse à cause d'énormes overdoses d'opiacés. Stan est sur le point d'être balancé comme dealer de drogue.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Fils de Potter : Au rassemblement annuel pour Halloween, une sorcière lance un sort qui terrorise tout le monde à South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mensonges et trahisons : Kyle joue avec le feu en s'interposant dans la relation de Cartman et Heidi.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tardigrades : L'expérience de Jimmy et de Timmy pourrait leur rapporter le premier prix à la foire annuelle des sciences.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Super Principale Adjointe : Les temps sont durs pour ceux qui exercent le métier de principal.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Tomates écrabouillées : Les enfants de South Park affirment avoir vu M. Garrison traîner dans le village. Les villageois sont en colère contre le président, qui effraie leurs enfants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Défunts Enfants : Randy s'acharne à calmer Sharon et Cartman rate son contrôle de maths de façon inattendue.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Garçon et le Prêtre : Butters devient très proche du prêtre de South Park. Un dimanche matin, le prêtre disparaît et l'église est fermée. Les paroissiens décident d'appeler l'archevêque.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Problème de la Crotte : L'attitude agressive de M. Hankey lui vaut la menace d'un renvoi de son poste de directeur du défilé de Noël. Principal PC et la principale adjointe voient leur relation évoluer à un tout autre degré.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Plantation Tégrité : Butters vend des cigarettes électroniques et des liquides fruités à l'école. Randy décide d'emmener sa famille vivre à la campagne pour devenir agriculteur.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les Trottinettes : Les enfants prévoient d'utiliser un moyen de transport révolutionnaire pour collecter plus de bonbons que jamais le soir d'Halloween.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Soyons Sérieuks : Les habitants de South Park sont en danger et les garçons se rendent compte qu'Al Gore peut leur venir en aide.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Personne N'Est Sérieuks : Les garçons s'évadent de prison. Ils sont poursuivis par la police et l'Homoursporc.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Buddha Box : Cartman souffre d'anxiété.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Insatisfait : South Park est désignée pour devenir le foyer du tout nouveau Centre d'Accomplissement d'Amazon.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La Vélo Parade : Les garçons craignent que la 1re place de la Vélo Parade ne leur échappe lorsque Kenny les lâche.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Joker mexicain : Randy affronte les habitants qui cultivent eux-mêmes leur herbe. Pendant ce temps-là, Kyle est emmené dans un camp.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: À l'assaut de la Chine : Randy souhaite exporter Tégrité en Chine.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mangez de la gelée : Cartman est persuadé que le nouveau menu de la cantine à base de plantes lui a provoqué une crise cardiaque.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La spéciale Halloween de la plantation Tégrité : C'est Halloween, et Randy est aux prises avec Shelley qui a un problème avec la marijuana.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Fin de saison : Les habitants de South Park en ont marre de Randy et de la plantation Tégrité et veulent l'envoyer en prison.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Jeux de filles : La compétition annuelle Super Femme pousse tout le monde à bout.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Voleurs de crottes : La mère de Kyle reçoit une transplantation fécale et les garçons partent à la recherche du meilleur microbiote.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Télévision par Câble : Scott Malkinson essaie désespérément d'impressionner sa nouvelle camarade de classe.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La neige de Noël : Le père Noël confisque toute la joie des habitants lors des fêtes de Noël.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Spécial Pandémie : Randy accepte difficilement le rôle qu'il a joué dans la pandémie de COVID-19 alors que la situation s'aggrave pour les habitants de South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: South ParQ spécial vaccination : Les habitants de South Park exigent un vaccin contre la COVID-19. Des militants refusent que M. Garrison se fasse vacciner. Randy reconnaît qu'il a joué un rôle dans la propagation de l'épidémie. Cartman n'est pas ravi de retourner à l'école."

programme.title: South Park: Cartman a une sonde anale
programme.desc: Cartman a une sonde anale : Les aliens implantent un émetteur dans Cartman et kidnappent le frère de Kyle.

programme.title: South Park: Muscle Plus 4000
programme.desc: Muscle Plus 4000 : Cartman tente de se muscler en prenant du Muscle Plus 4000. De son côté, Mr Garrison essaye d'assassiner Kathie Lee Gifford.

programme.title: South Park: Volcan
programme.desc: Volcan : Les enfants partent à la chasse avec Jimbo, l'oncle de Stan, lorsqu'un volcan entre en éruption. Cartman invente la légende de Kucrapok pour faire peur aux autres mais est-ce seulement imaginaire ?

programme.title: Baggage

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters : A crotchety old man and a teenage runaway form an unlikely friendship. Julie grows frustrated when an old friend of her brother's repeatedly rejects her advances without explanation.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time : Isaac's possessive mother becomes jealous of her son's lady friend, while he objects to his mom sharing a cabin with her latest boyfriend; a divorced comedy team is too busy making jokes to admit they miss each other.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2 : Millionaire superstars Roz and Bill (Michele Lee and Fernando Lamas) have remarried and are celebrating their newest honeymoon aboard the Pacific Princess in "Hollywood Royalty."

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson : A congressman unjustly accused of being involved in a scandal seeks refuge aboard the Pacific Princess; Isaac and a lovely intellectual snob clash over a colorful old passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Last Of The Stubings / Million Dollar Man / The Sisters : Stubing's nephew comes on board to train to be a seaman but doesn't do a good job at anything he does.

programme.desc: Computerman / Memories Of You / Parlez Vous? : A slick computer matchmaker proceeds to pair up cruise guests while setting himself up with Julie; two American gold-diggers pretend to be French; a New York advertising executive meets up with a long-lost love.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.desc: A Little Girl : Blake grows suspicious of Peter DeVilbis; Claudia receives more violets from 'Lancelot'; Adam tells Blake the truth of the poisoning incident; after suffering a seizure, Kirby undergoes emergency surgery and loses her baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Accident : Allegre is returned and Blake's suspicions about Peter's involvement are founded; Tracy orchestrates a press campaign to ruin Krystle; learning her fiance has left the country, Fallon dashes from the hotel and is struck by a truck.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Vigil : Peter DeVilbis, caught while trying to leave the country, is arrested for possession of drugs and jailed; Blake is offered a political post; Fallon regains consciousness and learns she is paralyzed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steps : Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.desc: The Voice, Pt. 2 : Alexis makes plan to upset Blake's business deal with Rashid Ahmed; Tracy attempts to seduce Blake and is fired; Steven grows suspicious of Dex, who places a mysterious phone call to Claudia.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Kitchen Confusion : Kim fancies herself a chef, and David wants to make her a kitchen she can really cook in. But he’s gotten off to a terrible start and flooded their kitchen with cement! Bryan will rein him in and start him off right.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Easy Bein' Green : Amy and Alex are trying to go green. She has terrible allergies, and he doesn’t want to waste a thing, so Bryan will teach them that it’s easy to be green when doing a basement reno.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Kitchen Calamity : Cee has been shoving paper Mache into her walls in her kitchen to attempt to hold it together, while partner Sue questions the sturdiness of Cee’s creative Reno’s.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Tiling Crackdown : Nicole has called on Bryan to help. Her mother Bernice has been dry fitting tiles and wrapping the shower in cellophane as she attempted to do it all herself over the last two years.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Bathroom Boundaries : Karen and Steph are newly weds and have recently moved into the basement of Steph’s mother. In order to get some privacy, Steph tried to build a bathroom in their apartment.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Hair Raising Reno : Frank bought a new house and convinced his wife Andrea that if they moved in with his parents, he could finish the house in two weeks. It’s been six months and all Frank has managed to do is gut the entire house and put down some sub floor…

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Blundering Basement : Zubin is a hard working guy who has been running between his job and his basement disaster that he’s preparing for his son. Sandra, his wife doesn’t believe Zubin is actually doing any Reno’s when he goes to the basement

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Hair Raising Reno : Clifton and Caroline have seven children and in an effort to help makes ends meet, Clifton built a hair salon for Caroline in the house. The trouble is Clifton is clueless when it comes to home renovation.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Kitchen in Chaos : David is a scrambled guy. He has started renovations all over the house and never finished them. His wife Marika has finally had enough after he messed with her kitchen.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Disaster Dude : Stacey a Buddha master of calm, has had a meditative vision of her husband Kevin finishing the rec-room in their basement. Kevyn on the other hand has a vision of himself being handy, but this vision is far from reality.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Mudding Muddle : Marcello’s patience like his espresso is running short. His partner David convinced him to move out of his nice clean condo and into this money pit. He assured Marcello that he could finish the house in a two months.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: The Elephant : Tony wanted a 70inch television in the basement. To get this, he had to knock down the bathroom and move it into the laundry room. His wife Janice is furious because now she has no bathroom and no laundry room.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Bumbling Benny : Benny is spending too much time on the yoga mat while his young family struggles to maneuver around his makeshift shed in the backyard. He wanted to build a storage shed and the monstrosity had to be torn down.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Gravel : Mark has improperly pieced together his basement; use of the wrong materials and misuse of the right ones has pushed his wife Maryse over the edge. So Maryse calls Bryan to comes in to give Mark a crash course.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Humane Society : The Oakville Humane Society is about to burst at the seams! This facility was meant to house 150 animals, but they currently have 400. With little money to repair the aging building, they need Bryan's help.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Small Vision Kitchen : Brian’s self proclaimed laziness has left him and his wife Miki with a constructions site for a Kitchen. Miki can’t cook (which she loves) and Brian can’t eat her cooking (which he loves).

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Bathroom Reborn : Graham has half done half of the bathroom and Heather has lost all her patients. Lose tiles and lack of direction has left her without relief. Can Bryan show Graham the way to fully refinish his bathroom?

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Diamond in the Rough : Steve has promised Leslie a finished laundry room in the basement and not followed through. The lack of progress has made Leslie put her hopes out to dry. Will Bryan help Steve complete the job?

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Finally Finishing : Justin needs no help starting the job, it’s the finishing that has escaped him. Holes in the floor, exposed heating ducts and a partially exposed brick wall are driving his wife Rachel crazy.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Family Dreams Come True Pt.1 : David Paquette has found himself and his 5 children living in a structurally compromised house. With no hot water and only a woodstove for heat Andrew Hamilton and the Local community reach out for the Bryan's help.

programme.title: Disaster DIY
programme.desc: Family Dreams Come True Pt.2 : Part two of providing David Paquette and his 5 children with a dream home.

programme.title: Leave It To Bryan

programme.title: Leave It To Bryan
programme.desc: The Cold War : Andy and Allison bought their first home - the shiny ‘50s wallpaper adorning the inside of their walls was free.

programme.title: Leave It To Bryan

programme.title: Leave It To Bryan
programme.desc: Curbed Reno : Des and Jeannice want their house’s interior to match the exterior curb appeal of their home. With the couple’s heart set on high-end custom finishes, Bryan may have to play the role of heartbreaker.

programme.title: Leave It To Bryan
programme.desc: Backseat Contractor : Sara & Wassim can’t agree on which renovation is next on their giant to do list. Bryan has to choose the reno they need and take on Sara who isn’t used to anyone else taking the wheel.

programme.title: Leave It To Bryan
programme.desc: The Wall of Blame : Carmen and Alex have saved up for their first reno in their modest home. They are thrilled with Bryan’s help, until a particular wall becomes a bigger deal than it’s worth.

programme.title: Leave It To Bryan
programme.desc: The Way the Reno Crumbles : Renee and Kris live in an aging home with a ton of character. They’re ready to bite the bullet and commit to a big reno project, but when Bryan discovers what lies beneath, they might be wishing for a different house.

programme.desc: Aromatherapy : An old man, inexplicably emanating a horrible stench, consults Doctor Ellingham. Meanwhile, the local radio host, Caroline, seems to have a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Always on My Mind : Martin examines Helen Pratt, but she collapses and dies. Her husband, Phil, is angry with the doctor and blames him for his wife's death.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The Apple Doesn't Fall : Aunt Joan is forced to receive treatment from Martin after nearly running someone over. The Doc is approached by Alison Lane, who worries about her daughter Delph's behavior.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Movement : Bert Large abandons his plumbing business in favor of running a restaurant. Following the restaurant's opening, several cases of food poisoning occur, with Louisa being one of the people affected.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flashover : A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For Love or Money : When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Drowning Sorrows : A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Once Bitten : Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Cop Out : When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Line of Fire : In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Home of the Brave : In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Army of Evidence : A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Telltale Tracks : The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Smoking Out a Killer : A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Palm Saturday : At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Murder, She Wrote : A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: News at 11 : When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Big Chill : For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time Will Tell : In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunting Vision : Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Welcome Intrusion : A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Window Watcher : In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shot of Vengeance : A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: All Butt Certain : A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who's Your Daddy : In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Purebread Murder : In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids apartment after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nursery Crimes : An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Waste Mis-Management : Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Tight Leash : How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Smoke in your Eyes : A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Capitol Crimes : The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Clutch of Witnesses : Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dark Waters : When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: All Charged Up : Using an anonymous letter and geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Left for Dead : Jones is brought back to his home town to help investigate a series of murders linked to childhood friends and events that occurred years earlier.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Magician's Nephew : The traditions of the Temple of Thoth, a local cult in Midsomer, appear to be related to a series of murders using poison of the poison dart frog.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Days of Misrule : Barnaby has to solve an explosion as well as a number of murders near a freight company while trying to cope with his acting CS who has very strong beliefs about teamwork.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Talking to the Dead : Barnaby finds connections between a supposedly haunted forest, the traceless disappearances of two couples and a gang of antiquity thieves.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: House of Secrets : In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A Family Accused : A report that focuses on cases where people accused of sexually abusing children were tried and imprisoned based on little real evidence other than the testimony of young children.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Missing Molly : A report on the unsolved abduction and murder of 16-year-old Molly Bish. Bish disappeared in June 2000 from the local swimming hole. In May 2003, Tim McGuigan, a former police officer, helped discover evidence that lead to the discovery of Molly’s body.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Blood Feud : Nancy Seaman, an award-winning teacher living in Farmington Hills, Michigan was accused of the 2004 hatchet/stabbing murder of her husband, Bob. She admits killing him, but says it was self-defense, claiming that he had been abusing her for years.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Pretender : A report on the case that has inspired the 2015 theatrical film “True Story”, which recounts how Christian Longo posed as discredited New York Times journalist Michael Finkel, while on the run in Mexico -- after murdering his wife and children in Oregon.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Driven to Extremes : Mary Hill was driving three teens, when her BMW crashed and killed two of them. Hill claims she lost control as the car sped up on its own, but investigators say she was driving recklessly. Hill was charged with vehicular homicide and manslaughter.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Natalie Wood: Death in Dark Water : Los Angeles County Sheriff's investigators talk about the drowning death of actress Natalie Wood and suspicions about her then-husband, actor Robert Wagner.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Killer App : The dangers of anonymous chat apps; a father discovers his 15-year-old daughter planning to run away with a 30-year-old man she met online; a teenage girl is found stabbed to death after making friends online.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Follow the Money : In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The FBI Declassified: 20 Days of Terror: The Austin Bomber : The Bureau works side by side with multiple law enforcement agencies to identify, track and catch a serial bomber who killed and maimed random victims in Austin in the spring of 2018.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz : The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Where's Our Baby? : In November 1997, Marlene and Steve Aisenberg reported their five-month-old daughter Sabrina missing from her crib. Police soon focused on the parents as authorities became convinced that they knew more about the baby’s disappearance than they admitted.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Death at Cottonwood Creek : Frederick Mueller says while he and his wife were out for a walk near their vacation home, she fell off a cliff while he stopped to take a photo of her. Was it murder or an accident?

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Confession : A report on the 1998 murder, of 12-year-old Stephanie Crowe. The girl's 14-year-old brother Michael, and his two friends confessed to the killing. Their attorney claims that the confessions were false and the result of police coercion.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The McGuire Diaries : In May of 2004, Bill McGuire’s dismembered body was found in three suitcases in Chesapeake Bay. He had been shot with a .38 caliber gun. His wife Melanie claimed that Bill had vanished weeks before, after an argument.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Texas Confidential : A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Betting Her Life : Susan Wright was a stay-at-home mother from Texas who stabbed her husband Jeff, 193 times. She claimed she was a victim of domestic abuse and that on January 13, 2003, her husband attacked her with a knife and she fought back in self-defense.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Classic Cabin / Julia and John : After going more than half a century without renovations, Julia and John are hoping their worn-out family cabin - built by John’s grandfather - can start generating money for them.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: European Villa / Anita and Marco : Built in the early 1970s, Anita’s dad’s Muskoka cottage has strong bones but is very outdated. She wants to turn it into a place that will both honor his legacy and generate an income so the family can hold onto the property.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Funky Farmhouse / Nadia and Anwar : Nadia and Anwar bought their farmhouse on a semi-whim as a generational property to enjoy with their daughters, but also with the intention of generating some short-term rental income.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Historic Highland Lodge / Cindy and Sean : Fitness instructors Cindy and Sean own a historic 150-year-old cabin in Muskoka. They’re hoping to rent it out to fund their travel plans, but first they want the years of haphazard add-ons remodeled.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Homestead Hideaway / Reesha and Duncan : Homeowners Reesha and Duncan purchased a rundown lakeside cabin to rent out and generate income for their growing family.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Lakeview Farmhouse / Megan and Marc : Marc, a fire captain in the city, bought a farmhouse to create some family memories with his son, and daughter Megan. However, it’s pretty clear this rundown place was built purely for function.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Northern Getaway / Darlene and James : Empty nesters Darlene and James have a family cottage located on the beautiful Moon River that’s in bad need of repair.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Playful Paradise / Rowan and Curtis : Rowan and his son Curtis just bought a 3 bedroom lake house to enjoy and rent out for part of the year. But the property is looking bland and boring.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Scandi Ski Chalet / Vicky and Todd : Vicky and Todd recently bought a dated old house near a ski hill, and they think it could earn them some money, if the proper reno job were done.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Throwback Getaway / Erin and Gerald : Erin and Gerald are the owners of a rundown cottage they don’t use so much anymore. They’re hoping that a good renovation will turn it into a profit generator.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Zen’d Out Retreat / Caroline and Gihad : For front line health care workers Caroline and Gihad, the decision to buy a cottage was influenced by their stressful jobs. They wanted a place to relax and decompress.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Anne and Karen : Anne and her sister, Karin, bought their duplex from their landlord a couple of years ago. Now, Karin has unexpectedly fallen in love and she's moving out. That leaves Anne with a full mortgage to pay.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Daria and James : Daria and James fell in love, got engaged and bought a house. Two years later they are still not married and they’re spending over 50% of their income on their home. They need an income suite.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: David : Scott McGillivray helps first-time home buyer David create a perfect income suite.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Evelyn and Armel : Evelyn and Armel had an energy audit and now they’re racking up debt in order to make smart improvements to their home. They need the income from an apartment to help out with the costs of renovating for the long-term.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Fernando and David : Fernando and his partner David have a lot of taste and energy. They bought a neglected triplex with the intention of painstakingly renovating every nook and cranny. Unfortunately, they ran out money and energy.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Jen and In-Suk : Jennifer and In-Suk experienced a financial setback. With Jennifer on maternity leave and In-Suk unemployed for the last seven months, this couple needs an income suite to offset their mortgage costs.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Julia and Andy : Julie and Andy intend to renovate the existing income suite in their new home. They just can’t make it happen. They have demanding careers and no renovation experience. They need Scott’s skills and reno savvy.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Lise and Andre : Lise will be 63 years old when her 35-year mortgage is finally paid off. With an basement income suite, she could be mortgage free in 13 years, at 39! Scott will help set Lise on the path to financial freedom.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Marsha, Ellwood and Sarah : Marsha and Ellwood married 4 years ago bringing two kids each to their blended home and a future with three college educations to consider.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Rob and Allison : Allison and Rob’s income dipped due to a career change and maternity leave. Luckily, they have an income suite in their basement that can help them maintain their great standard of living.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: Paniolo : When a beloved Paniolo (Hawaiian cowboy) is shot while out riding his horse, Jane and her team must gain the trust of the Paniolo community to help find the culprits and protect the Paniolo's life.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: Gaijin : When a Japanese sailor is killed on American soil and evidence links the case to the previous murder of the victim's girlfriend back in Japan, NCIS must find the murderer before the wrong person is accused and the case triggers a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Take Out : Don and his team investigate a rash of deadly restaurant robberies.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: End of Watch : Don and the FBI re-open a 17-year-old unsolved case when the badge of a missing LAPD officer, who is presumed dead, is found at a construction site.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Dying Words : The CSI team investigates a murder case that hits close to home for Folsom. When he is forced to sit this investigation out, he does his own digging with help from Trey.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: The Murdaugh Family : In 2023, Alex Murdaugh was convicted of murdering his wife and son, linked to his financial crimes.

programme.desc: Jerry Michael 'Mike' Williams : When Jerry 'Mike' Williams died in a boating accident, questions soon emerged about his wife Denise.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: The Smith Family : In 2015, the Smith family were brutally murdered in their home by a relative seeking to inherit their estate.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: Abraham Shakespeare : Lottery winner Abraham Shakespeare was murdered in 2009 by Dee Dee Moore, who sought to steal his fortune.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: William Saunderson-Smith : In 2011, a reclusive British millionaire was beaten to death by three men seeking his hidden fortune.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: Anthony Ashley-Cooper : In a high-profile case, police discovered the remains of an aristocrat, leading them to his estranged wife.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Target: Mafia: Empire Of Crime : The Mafia builds its own world--nightclubs, racetracks, and casinos--and climbs to the highest levels of power. Vito Genovese accompanies General Patton.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Target: Mafia: Gangbusters : Examines the triangular relationship between politicians, lawmen, and the underworld. Features the murderous Dutch Schultz and his target D.A. Thomas Dewey.

programme.title: American Justice

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: Sian Blake : Colin Sutton and his team make a discovery when they investigate the case of "Eastenders" actress Sian Blake, who went missing with her two children in December 2015.

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: The Murder of Ronnie Cook : Former detective Colin Sutton revisits Ronnie Cook's fatal shooting by his armed robber girlfriend after a hitman's failed attempt, earning Linda Calvey the nickname "the Black Widow."

programme.title: The Playboy Bunny Murder

programme.title: Poisonous Liaisons

programme.desc: Is My Teen Daughter's Fiance A Cheater? : If Mayyadah’s husband’s lie detector test proves that he’s having sex through online chat rooms, then they’re getting a divorce! Will Debbie kick fiancée Pablo out over cheating suspicions?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: My Sister Cheated On You..You're Not Her Baby's Dad! : Shatoria keeps telling D'Eric that he didn't father her sister Latasha's child! Then, CiCi's ex-boyfriend Angel is denying her baby because his best friend Ralphie says so! The results will leave you speechless!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.desc: Shocking Truths Exposed : Daisy is dumped by her girlfriend for another woman. Then Gina tells her boyfriend Denise about her ongoing affair with her ex-husband. The cat's out of the bag today!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: I Can't Stop Loving You! : It’s the battle of the exes! Tony fights to get her ex-lover back. Richard reveals to his wife that he’s had an affair, and watches as Lisa, his ex-lover, fights to get him back!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Explosive Love Affairs : Jerry reveals he's having a secret affair. Tenille wants to confront the woman sleeping with her baby's father. Jenny wants to confront the woman living with her lover!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The Jerry Springer Show : Damon confesses that he's cheating on his wife. John's never been a one-woman-man and comes clean to his girlfriend about Tiffany. Dee wants to confront his ex's new boyfriend.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: A Virtuous Preacher : Denisha says when she met Christopher, he told her he was a youth minister, owned a condo by the beach, and that he would remain faithful to her. She says those were all lies and today she wants her freedom back.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Legendary Journey! The Dog and the Cat and the Pirate King! : Dogstorm and Cat Viper share their story of being on the journey with Oden and Roger but are interrupted by Nami who is concerned about the sea route. Meanwhile, Jack is plotting to bring down the Mokomo Dukedom again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Nightmare Returns! The Invincible Jack's Fierce Attack! : The plans are set! The Straw Hats divide and conquer, one group heading to save Sanji, the others to the Land of Wano! But in the final moments before their departure, the tremendous elephant island begins to quake!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Battle to Defend Zou! Luffy and Zunesha! : After being aggressively attacked by Jack's fleet, the monstrous Zunesha comes to life and beckons to those on its back! But can the Straw Hats understand its cry? And realize in time what the elephant island needs from them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Save Zunesha! The Straw Hat's Rescue Operation! : With the skirmish with Jack now over, the Straw Hats move on to trying to bandage the great elephant's wounds! But just as the whole island puts the plan into action, unseen danger lurks on horizon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Saying Goodbye and Descending from the Elephant! Setting Out to Take Back Sanji! : The Straw Hats and the others split up into four teams, each on different missions! Some from the Mink Tribe insist on leaving with Luffy's team! Meanwhile, Usopp makes a weapon for Nami that seems to work like magic!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To the Reverie! Princess Vivi and Princess Shirahoshi! : Luffy's team sets out from Zou on their way to win back Sanji! But they didn't realize there is one more crewmember than they have bargained for!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To the Reverie! Rebecca and the Sakura Kingdom! : Carrot stows away! And settles in with the Straw Hats as they make their way to rescue Sanji! Meanwhile, in the Sakura Kingdom, Dalton and Kureha are getting ready for the Reverie so as their former enemy in his newly-built kingdom…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaido Returns! An Imminent Threat to the Worst Generation! : News of the raid on the Revolutionary Army reaches Luffy! But that's the least of their worries as they face a storm and a sudden lack of provisions! Meanwhile, Emperor Kaido fumes with anger at the reckless generation of upstarts!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Hungry Front! Luffy and the Navy Rookies! : Sneaking in to the Navy island facility to replenish their food supply, Luffy and the others risk being caught out in the open! Will their infamy make them easy to spot by the hotheaded Navy recruits around them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Implacable Three! A Big Chase After the Straw Hats! : The jig is up as Luffy and the others make a daring dash to avoid the furious Navy! Can they escape without having to turn to fight - and after they've had a chance to raid the cabinets for food?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Devil's Fist! A Show Down! Luffy vs. Grount! : Making a mad dash for the Submerge with the food they stole, Luffy and the others have to get through some of the Navy's upstart soldiers! Grount, whose arm holds incredible power, summons his training to challenge Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Explore! A Kingdom of Love and Passion - Dressrosa! : Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Full of Enthusiasm! The Corrida Colosseum! : Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Dangerous Love! The Dancer Girl - Violet! : Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Formidable, Unknown Warrior! Here Comes Lucy! : Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Pirate Noble! Cavendish! : While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Super Rookie! Bartolomeo the Cannibal! : The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Names Duke It Out! The Heated Block B Battle! : Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Deadly Blow! The Astonishing King Punch! : The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Fighting Fish Strike! Across the Deadly Iron Bridge! : As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Explore! Fairies' Island - Green Bit! : Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Unknown World! The Tontatta Kingdom! : All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Stratagem of the Century! Doflamingo Makes His Move! : Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shaking Heaven and Earth! Admiral Fujitora's Power! : Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Blow of Anger! A Giant vs. Lucy! : The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Destruction Cannon Blasts! Lucy in Trouble! : After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Legendary Pirate! Don Chin Jao! : Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Light and Shadow! Darkness behind Dressrosa! : Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: To The South Pole : To The South Pole: Rescue Truck arrives at Diego's Animal Center to deliver a cute, little animal that's really lost: a penguin! It's up to Dora, Boots and Diego to bring Pingüino all the way back home to the South Pole.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves The Game : Dora Saves The Game: Dora's cousin Daisy is playing in a big soccer game that's showing on TV. But Daisy's team is short a player. Daisy appeals to Dora to come play on her team and save the game. Run, Dora, run!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: What Happens Next? : What Happens Next?: What comes after "The End"? Dora and Boots are finishing a fairy tale, and reach the end of the story. They wonder what happens next.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Rescue, Rescue, Rescue : Rescue, Rescue, Rescue: Oh no! Three of our friends are in trouble. Baby Jaguar is stuck in a tree, Isa is stuck in a big sand hole, and Benny is stuck in his balloon on top of the Gooey Geyser. Who do we have to rescue first?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boot's Cuddly Dinosaur : Boot's Cuddly Dinosaur: It's bedtime, and Dora and Boots are having a sleepover. Dora has her teddy bear, Osito, but Boots can't find his cuddly dinosaur. Oh no! His dinosaur must have fallen out of his bag at Play Park.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Super Silly Fiesta : The Super Silly Fiesta: Bawk! It's fiesta time! Dora and Boots are invited to the Big Red Chicken's Super Silly Fiesta! There will be silly snacks, silly games, silly hats and even silly dancing.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Fix-It Machine : The Fix-It Machine: Uh oh! Boots has a hole - un hoyo - in his boot! But Dora knows what to do. They can go to the Super Duper Fix-It Machine to fix it right up!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baseball Boots : Baseball Boots: Boots loves baseball. He loves to run and catch and throw, but so far he's never gotten a hit. Boots is determined to get his first hit. Dora and Boots have a big baseball game today.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Best Friends : Happy Best Friends Day! Today's a special day for best friends to play together. Boots and Dora decide to meet for a picnic to celebrate. Boots is bringing chocolate; Dora is bringing yummy strawberries.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: ABC Animals : A is for armadillo, but where are the rest of the animals in the ABC book? They're missing! Dora and Boots jump into the giant alphabet book to help the little armadillo solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Job Day : What do you want to be when you grow up? On today's adventure, Dora and Boots get to try all sorts of jobs - from a pilot to a chef to an archeologist. But what will Dora decide to be when she grows up?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Star Catcher : Excited, Dora puts the Star Pocket on Backpack and Dora and Boots set off on their very first star catching adventure. Their educational journey will take them all the way to the Cloud Castle, as they try to rescue an adorable baby star.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's First Trip : Dora tells the story of how she first met Boots. On their very first adventure, Dora and Boots have to bring instruments back to the Fiesta Trio so they can play for the cranky Queen Bee.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Star Mountain : Swiper swipes Dora's favorite necklace and flings it all the way to the top of Star Mountain! To get to the peak, Dora and Boots need to run up the Star Steps, climb up the Diamond, and make it through ice, wind, and snow!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: La Maestra de Musica : "Hola, hola!/ Hello, Hello!/ It's a great day for school/ You know!" Boots' music teacher, la maestra de música, needs to get to school in a hurry - but her bicycle is broken!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Daisy, La Quinceanera : It's Dora's cousin Daisy's 15th birthday party, her quinceañera! But the party can't start without Dora and Boots - they need to teach everybody the mambo!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Save Diego : Dora's cousin Diego protects and defends all the animals in the rainforest. But in order to save a Baby Condor, Diego winds up trapped himself. And now he needs OUR help! ¡No te preocupes, Diego!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Jaguar's Roar : Oh no! Baby Jaguar's best friend, Baby Bear, is stuck on a ledge atop Bear Mountain - and the ledge is cracking! With Baby Jaguar leading the way, Dora, Boots, and Diego race to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: A Crown for King BoBo : Dora and Boots set out to help King Juan el Bobo find his crown so we can all go to his Mamí's birthday party. Where did the forgetful king put his crown?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Got a Puppy : Abuela gives Dora and Boots a present for Dora's new puppy, but they'll have to watch out for Swiper, who's got a bunch of new swiping tricks up his sleeves.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Big Sister Dora : Dora has some really exciting news to tell us: Someone new is joining Dora's family! Someone who sleeps in a cradle, drinks from a bottle, wears diapers and likes to be rocked to sleep. Can you guess who it is? That's right!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots to the Rescue : Oh, no! Dora left her music homework in Boots' room. It's a song in English and Spanish, and she needs Boots to bring it to her school so she can sing it to the class.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Super Babies : Dora's baby brother and sister just love bananas, but they also love stories! So Dora tells them a Super Babies story! The Super Babies have to get their bananas back from that Super Villain Swiper the Fox.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: We're a Team : Dora and all her friends are at the Super Adventure Race! To win the race, they have to make it across the Troll's tricky Bridge, past the Volcano filled with gooey balls, over the giant wall, and all the way to the finish line.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Mixed-Up Seasons : It's summertime, and Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach. But suddenly, they encounter the strangest sight - a snowman in Summer? What's wrong with this picture? Oh, no!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Shy Rainbow : Dora and Boots are hiking on Rainbow Rock when they come across a shy rainbow, Arco Iris, hiding behind a waterfall.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Crab : Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach when all of a sudden they hear a call for help. It's a baby crab stuck in a net!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper the Explorer : Dora and Boots are playing catch when they discover a lost Baby Fox. And he wants his mommy! Just then, Swiper shows up to swipe Boots' superball.

programme.title: The Poison Rose

programme.title: GRINGO
programme.desc: GRINGO : GRINGO, a dark comedy mixed with white-knuckle action, explores the battle of survival for businessman Harold Soyinka (David Oyelowo) when he finds himself crossing the line from law-abiding citizen to wanted criminal.

programme.desc: The Frame : Gangster Jack Wellman is moving syndicated crime into politics, killing off certain politicians and replacing them with men more sympathetic to the Syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Trial : Josef Varsh plans to put an American on trial on false charges, discredit the West, and gain power.

programme.desc: The Diamond : Henrik Durvard has taken over the country of Lombuanada by a military coup, and holds the natives in terror. He has obtained a diamond from the native miners, and the IMF is assigned to take it away from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Legend : An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Snowball In Hell : A former prison guard, Sefra, has acquired a supply of cesium 138, which explodes at temperatures above 70 degrees.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Confession : The team must break a Communist assassin who killed a U.S. Senator.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Action! : Miklos Klaar, an Iron Curtain filmmaker, has film of American soldiers and plans to edit it into an atrocity movie to discredit the U.S.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Train : Prime Minister Larya of Svardia is working to establish democracy, but is unaware that his personal protege, Deputy Premier Pavel, plans to set up a dictatorship.
