programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 5 Chefs Compete : The chefs serve forty "glampers,” who vote to determine their favorite. The victor goes glamping in Los Angeles for a night; the losers spruce up the Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 4 Chefs Compete : The remaining players take part in the annual "taste it, now make it" challenge. The winner dines with their family at Mr. Chow, followed by a chocolate tasting at Vosges.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Winner Chosen : The finalists work on their own menus. Then, in front of a live audience, they must cook five unique dishes with two appetizers and three entrées featuring beef, chicken and fish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 18 Chefs Compete : For the season's first challenge, the hopeful chefs prepare their signature dishes. The winners ride a hummer to Saint Rocke in Hermosa Beach to meet William Shatner ("Star Trek").

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 17 Chefs Compete : Each team must retrieve 25 crabs from the ocean. After splitting into pairs, each team must make ten crab cakes for Chef Ramsay. The winners dine at Talavera.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 16 Chefs Compete : In this episode's challenge, the teams must match fish heads to their correct bodies, then prepare dishes to impress guest judge Michael Cimarusti.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 15 Chefs Compete : The contestants prepare American comfort food for the judges: Chef Ramsay, Chef Suzanne Goin and Chef David Burke. The winners sip cocktails aboard the American Pride in Long Beach.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 14 Chefs Compete : The remaining contestants participate in a cheese challenge. The winners go jet skiing in Marina Del Ray while the losers spend the day grating parmesan.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 13 Chefs Compete : The teams cook lunch for firefighters who are in the midst of a charity ride. The winners head to Malibu, dine at a vineyard and sip wine with Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 12 Chefs Compete : The remaining chefs are treated to live Greek dancing. Afterwards, they must choose a protein to cook a Greek dish with. The winners race go-karts while the losers clean the kitchens.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 11 Chefs Compete : Each team must create a dish using either beer, wine or liquor. “Cheers” star John Ratzenberger appears as a guest judge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 9 Chefs Compete : The remaining chefs must cook with exotic proteins, including ostrich and wild boar, to impress Chef Ramsay and the owners of the restaurant Animal.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 8 Chefs Compete (Part One) : The chefs cook a Mardi Gras-themed homecoming dinner for Calabasas High School. Both teams have 35 minutes to create three meals for the homecoming committee.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 8 Chefs Compete (Part Two) : The teams participate in the annual blind taste test. The winners go on a shopping spree and sample caviar. The losers make sangria and lug tabletops into the dining room.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 7 Chefs Compete : The chefs must rifle through a pile of keys to find the one that opens a locker full of steak cuts. After cooking their dishes, they present them to Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 6 Chefs Compete : The chefs participate in the annual "taste it, now make it" challenge. The winners spend the day on the RMS Queen Mary in Long Beach while the losers sort the recycling.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 5 Chefs Compete : The remaining contestants are given just 45 minutes to make small dishes for the guests at a private concert featuring the UCLA Herb Alpert School of Music orchestra.

programme.title: The Dancing Detective: A Deadly Tango

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Expectations

programme.title: Hearts of Spring

programme.title: Easter Under Wraps

programme.title: Stop the Wedding

programme.title: Game of Love

programme.title: Growing The Big One
programme.desc: Growing The Big One : Personal and career circumstances force big-city radio host Emma to broadcast and web-cast from the home she inherited in rural Washington State.

programme.title: Marry Me in Yosemite
programme.desc: Marry Me in Yosemite : Zoe, a notable photojournalist, visits Yosemite landscapes made famous by Ansel Adams. When she meets Jack, an intriguing tour guide, he opens her eyes to new adventures as they embark on a journey.

programme.title: Three Wise Men and a Baby
programme.desc: Three Wise Men and a Baby : Three brothers get the surprise of their lives when they are forced to work together and care for a baby over the holidays.

programme.title: In Merry Measure
programme.desc: In Merry Measure : When pop star Darcy returns home to spend Christmas with her sister and niece, she unexpectedly finds herself coaching the high school choir with her onetime rival, Adam.

programme.title: Fit for Christmas

programme.title: In Merry Measure

programme.title: When I Think of Christmas
programme.desc: When I Think of Christmas : Sara comes home for Christmas to help her mom move, reconnects with a past love, and makes a surprising discovery for a holiday they will all remember.

programme.title: Engaging Father Christmas

programme.title: A Homecoming for the Holidays
programme.desc: A Homecoming for the Holidays : Country singer Charlotte is home for the holidays and brother Ryan's fellow ex-soldier Matt is in town. Writing her new album, Charlotte works with Matt to build a house for a friend in town.

programme.title: Family Christmas Gift

programme.title: Christmas Miracle

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini : Young mother Sherri Papini disappears while jogging and reappears three weeks later on Thanksgiving Day.

programme.title: A Killer in My Home

programme.title: Past Never Dies

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Grilling Season

programme.title: Let's Get Physical

programme.title: The Alleged Abduction

programme.title: VC Andrews Fallen Hearts

programme.title: Obsession Her Final Vengeance

programme.title: Undercover Cheerleader

programme.desc: Desperate Times : Nika & Chris struggle with a repair they can’t afford; Guillaume hits rocky ground while Ken is home for his son’s birth; Karl turns to family for help when his team is overloaded.

programme.title: Yukon Gold

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Mining for Gold : Scott and Sheldon go mining in Southern B.C. for great deals. A hot tip leads them to the mother lode of all collections.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Gone Fishing : Beat’s Arkansas house build is in trouble when delivery trucks arrive out of order, Bryan Jr. remodels a local bar for a penny-pinching friend, and Peter turns inventor to solve a work yard problem.

programme.title: Good Witch

programme.title: Good Witch

programme.title: Good Witch

programme.title: Good Witch

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Taye Diggs, Herb Garden & Cooking with Michael Symon, “The Prom” Star Jo Ellen Pellman : “All American” star Taye Diggs joins Drew to chat. Iron Chef Michael Symon teaches Drew how to make a hydroponic indoor herb garden and then shares how to use those home-grown herbs in a vegetable soup. Drew’s News with “The Prom” star Jo Ellen Pellman.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Isla Fisher & Leslie Mann, Beth Behrs, Drew-Gooder : “Blithe Spirit's” Isla Fisher & Leslie Mann chat. ”The Neighborhood's” Beth Behrs joins Drew. Luvvie Ajayi Jones joins Drew to shine the spotlight on another amazing black woman. Meet 10 y.o. Christian Stone who cleared snow off essential workers' cars.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy, Dear Drew, Drew’s News : “Coming 2 America” star Eddie Murphy. Drew reads your snail mail letters in signature segment, “Dear Drew.” Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new “Drew’s News.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Patricia Heaton, Design By Drew, Molly Bernard : “Your Second Act” author Patricia Heaton chats. “Younger” star Molly Bernard stops by. In new Design by Drew, Drew makes over the living room for a deserving woman who lost her father to COVID-19 and now helps seniors get appointments for their vaccine.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Cooking with Giada DeLaurentiis, Drew’s News : “Unfinished: A Memoir” author Priyanka Chopra Jonas chats. “Bobby and Giada in Italy” star Giada DeLaurentiis whips up Cacio E Pepe with Pancetta and Arugula and helps Drew surprise a Drew-Gooder. Drew and Ross team up in Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis, Chris Appleton, Drew Gooder: Good Deeds Store Follow Up : Giada De Laurentiis joins Drew for Cookbook Club and whips up Salmon Puttanesca. Drew revisits with the Principal whose school started a grocery store that only accepts good deeds as a form of payment. Chris Appleton shares his top hair styling tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Annaleigh Ashford, Olympic Snowboarder Jamie Anderson : Actress Annaleigh Ashford chats. Drew has a big surprise for nurse Gina Goodwin, who cooks and delivers hundreds of meals every Thanksgiving. Olympic snowboarder Jamie Anderson shares her winter skin routine. Drew reads letters in "Dear Drew."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ricki Lake, Hyram Yarbo, Healthy Noodle Recipes : Ricki Lake shares her personal battle with hair loss over the last 30 years, her year of self-discovery and finding new love. Skincare expert Hyram Yarbo shares his number one skincare tip. Drew and Ross Matthews whip up healthy noodle recipes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Leah Remini, Beauty Tips with Patrick Starrr : Game Show week concludes with “People Puzzler” host Leah Remini. Then, Drew is talking all things beauty with beauty influencer Patrick Starrr. Plus, Drew and Ross Matthews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new “Drew’s News.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "Charlie’s Angels" Reunion With Cameron Diaz & Lucy Liu, Adam Sandler : "The Drew Barrymore Show" kicks-off its premiere episode with a "Charlie’s Angels" reunion with Cameron Diaz and Lucy Liu. Drew also reunites with longtime friend / co-star Adam Sandler. Drew has a big surprise for a deserving family of essential workers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Michael Strahan, Cookbook Club with Jamie Oliver : "Good Morning America's" Michael Strahan joins Drew and tasks her with an extra messy stain challenge. Jamie Oliver whips up shrimp linguine and discusses his new book. Soccer player Leslie Osborne on creating a beauty line that outlasts your workout.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Andra Day, Ben & Erin Napier, Drew’s News : “The United States vs. Billie Holiday” star Andra Day stops by to chat. Design week continues with “Home Town” stars Ben and Erin Napier who help a VFF transform their bookshelf from boring to beautiful. Plus, Ross and Drew with a new Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Martha Stewart, Beauty In A Box, Dog Makeover with Jess Rona, The Weekender : Martha Stewart whips up a dish with Drew. Drew surprises a viewer who wants to ramp up her beauty routine for work Zooms. Comedian and dog groomer Jess Rona glams up a special pup. Drew gives a list of favorites in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kate Mara, Molly Sims, Holiday Food Traditions with Eitan : "A Teacher" star Kate Mara stops by to chat. Model and actress Molly Sims on the inspiration behind her lifestyle website. programme.desc: Getting Ready : A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Club Dance : Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girl friends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Diner : Ricky becomes interested in a diner that is for sale so the Ricardos and the Mertzes all buy it together. Right away, Ethel and Fred feel they are doing all the work while Lucy and Ricky have all the fun.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Black Wig : Lucy decides to try a new look, despite her husband Ricky's objections. She borrows a black wig from her hairdresser Roberta, who tells Lucy it makes her look like a whole different person. With that in mind, Lucy decides to play a little trick on Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennessee Ernie Visits : Lucy's mother writes to ask if she and her husband "Xavier" would be so kind as to entertain "a friend's roommate's cousin's middle boy, Ernest" when he visits New York.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennessee Ernie Hangs On : Lucy and Ricky, tired of the extensive visit by their cousin Tennessee Ernie, try to get rid of the likeable character by pleading poverty. Ernie then tries to help his gracious hosts out of their fiscal desperation.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Golf Game : Golf pro Jimmy Demaret visits Lucy and Ethel on the green to show them how the game is really played after they're misled by Ricky and Fred. Lucy and Ethel decide they'll learn how to play golf to spend more time with their husbands.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Sublease : Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Cries Wolf : Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Matchmaker : Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Business Manager : Ricky Ricardo hires business manager Mr. Hickox to solve the family budget problems. Lucy, dissatisfied with her new $5 per month allowance, manages to find a loophole in the business manager's system.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mr. and Mrs. TV Show : Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mertz and Kurtz : Lucy agrees to help her neighbor Fred Mertz impress an old vaudeville buddy who's in town for a visit. Lucy poses as the Mertzes maid "Bessie" to make Barney Kurtz believe Fred hit it big in real estate.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Movie Offer : Lucy mistakes Ben Benjamin, a Hollywood talent scout, for a burglar and nearly ruins Ricky's chance for a film career. When Benjamin arrives at the Ricardos' apartment to meet with Ricky, Lucy and Ethel smash a vase over his head!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Screen Test : Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders Ricky is a shooin for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Mother-In-Law : Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Body : Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Reunion : A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Umpire : Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 1) : Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 2) : Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Hucksters : Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Lovelorn : When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Christmas Show : Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Body : Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Megatron Resurrected : Super Optimus Prime emerges to find his team searching for energon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Megatron's Raid : Megatron is alive again and forces Scorponok to serve him, but Scorponok is loyal to only one master Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Starscream The Mysterious Mercenary : Megatron launches his first Energon raid since his resurrection.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Battle of The Asteroid Belt : Alpha Q has revived Starscream, who's mission is to destroy Optimus Prime, so as to regain a new body.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Energon Tower : The Autobots go into the asteroid belt to see what is going on after seeing something on radar, and find parts of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Legend of Rodimus : A new Autobot weapon is revealed that unleashes vast destruction to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Crisis In Jungle City : Alpha Q prepares to bring Unicron to life, while yet another Energon Tower is secured into place.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Kicker Beware : Alpha Q is not ready to let Earth go without a fight, and sends a group of stealth Terrorcons, named Command Ravage and Blackout.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Energon Grid : Megatron forces Demolishor to divulge the Autobots' secret of finding energon: Kicker.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Rodimus: Friend or Foe : Megatron has taken yet another plan, to create three meteors from Unicron and propel them at Earth before the energon grid has been completed, which he feels will "strike fear in Optimus Prime."

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Go For Unicron : While Snow Cat tests his power against the Energon Grid by sending frozen asteroids, Megatron decides to go after Alpha Q instead of Earth after finding a Terrorcon spy.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Return of Demolisher : Optimus reveals their mission is twofold: they are also going to destroy Unicron, and they prepare to set up a space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: A Tale of Two Heroes : The Autobots face a new threat: for Demolisher is revived in a new Power, who is tougher than ever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Battle Stations : The autobots continue on their journey and intercept a decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Alpha Q: Identity : The autobots continue their planning on taking out Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Shockblast: Rampage : Unicron's arrival causes the Decepticons on Cybertron to rebel, while Kicker learns the truth about Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Survival Instincts : Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, while Kicker tries to convince the Autobots to listen to Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Each One Fights… : Starved for energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Unicron Unleased : Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, in order to allow Unicron to "feed" on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Open Fire : Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Ripped Up Space : As the Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body and with Megatron throwing everything at them, Alpha Q provides support by fighting for the control of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Team Optimus Prime : Limping to join with the rest of the Autobots, Optimus Prime is confronted by Shockblast, who plans to take out Optimus Prime so as to prove that he is more superior than Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Protection : Megatron escapes into a black hole and Optimus Prime decides to give chase, even though he doesn’t know what he will find on the other side. Kicker joins his Autobot friends on their mission and pilots the Miranda II into the black hole.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Imprisoned Inferno : On the other side of the rip, the Autobots must now defend a whole new set of planets, and Wing Saber finally gets the chance to re-capture his prisoner Shockblast.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Jungle Planet : Shockblast has been captured and temporarily imprisoned on Iron Planet. Inferno is left to stand guard over Shockblast while the other Autobots are on Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Bulkhead : Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Farewell Inferno : The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Crash Course : Inferno uses his decepticon "half" to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Omega Supreme : The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: A Heroic Battle : Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.desc: The Case of the Sausalito Sunrise : Perry Mason defends an art gallery owner and his attractive Girl Friday twice accused of murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Twice-Told Twist : After his car is broken into, Perry Mason give a teenage criminal a second chance until the teen is charged with murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Tsarina's Tiara : An international jewel thief is murdered and a gem authority in South America is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Fanciful Frail : Two women switch identities: one to recover the $50,000 she is suspected of stealing and the other to elude a paid assassin.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Unwelcome Well : A ruthless oil tycoon is slain and the young geologist he betrayed is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Misguided Model : A glamorous model is threatened and the showy figure who tried to wreck her career is murdered.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Positive Negative : A retired general heading a local cleanup commission is charged with murder when the community's crime boss is found dead.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Crafty Kidnapper : A columnist is slain and the witnesses who could absolve the accused refuse to testify.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Final Fadeout : A television producer is charged with murder when a ruthless young actor is shot to death during the filming of a gunfight.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Mystery of the Dispersed Body Parts : When a box containing human limbs was discovered in Broward County, Florida, it kickstarted a multi-jurisdictional and multi-agency investigation that tested forensic capabilities.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Murdered For Love : When the bludgeoned body of Paul Gault was discovered lying in a pool of blood in an upstairs bedroom of his house, Northern Ireland police began to uncover the facts behind a brutal murder.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Betrayed - The Murder of David Jackson : In 1988, 24-year-old David Jackson left his home in Pembroke Pines, Florida, to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Cardiff Slasher : The case of the brutal murder of Lynette White which became the longest murder trial in British history and how familial DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Saturday Night Strangler : September 1973, with three murders in just 3 months, South Wales Police realized they were looking for Wales’ first serial killer. A twenty-eight year investigation finally uncovered the perpetrator.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Consummate Murder : The case of an Irish woman, Rachel O’Reilly, her savage murder, and the groundbreaking investigation that put her remorseless killer behind bars.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Unravelling the Murder of Janet Commins : The case of a brutal murder, a terrible injustice, and how a new, dedicated police team and DNA profiling eventually caught up with the killer, 40 years after the crime was committed.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Body in the Canal : The story of a barbaric murder and how smart police work and a broad forensic investigation not only identified the victim, but ultimately led to the people responsible.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Grangegorman Killer : This case, involving Ireland’s only living serial killer, was brought to a close after nearly two decades, with the help of advances in forensic science.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Tracing Suzanne Nauman's Murderer : The story of the violent death of a young, woman, how her murder investigation led police to another case, and how the science of DNA profiling played a central role in unravelling the truth.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill (Part 1) : Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: BTK: The Taunting (Part 2) : Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Night Stalker: Summer of Terror (Part 1) : The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Night Stalker: I Will Be Avenged (Part 2) : The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Co-ed Killer: The Murder Capital of the World (Part 1) : Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Co-ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2) : Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Plymouth Rocks : Mike discovers a 100-year-old turbo-charged hot rod; a massive man cave yields sweet deals; Frank hopes to save a vintage muscle car from a rusty fate.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Return of Hobo Jack : The guys make a return visit to Hobo Jack's forest sanctuary; the guys scour a mammoth warehouse in Chicago; Danielle lines up an appraiser for a one-of-a-kind art cat; Mike and Frank stumble on a former Dairy Queen turned pickers' paradise.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Captain Quirk : Frank and Dave's Florida road trip gets stranger at every turn, from a creepy collection of kitsch to a tugboat that's home to a captain and his unusual pet; back in Iowa, Mike readies the new shop for its grand opening.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Sturgis or Bust! : Danielle splurges on the skeletal remains of a rare 1935 Indian Chief and then tries to sell it at the Sturgis Motorcycle Rally.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Smooth Operators : As the guys finish their trip through the South, Danielle finds them the mother lode of rare motorbike parts; an incredible discovery guaranteed to impress their friend and NASCAR champion Ryan Newman.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Junkyard Wizard : A junkyard wizard has an Oktoberfest gem with Frank Fritz's name written all over it.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mad as a Picker : Danielle and the guys kick it into overdrive when they land a high-profile pick for Dollywood; a tribute to the Smokey Mountain Fire Patrol of the 1930s.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: One Giant Pick for Mankind : The guys uncover a former firefighter's stockpile which includes a rare piece of space-age history; Frank's plan goes up in smoke.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Time Warp : Mike and Frank are stunned by a house with storefronts frozen in time, containing a bounty of new-old stock and a secret bootlegging basement.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Hobo Jack : Danielle tells the guys they need to step up their game; Mike and Frank uncover lots of great stuff in Tony's sprawling Illinois collection; Ken has room after room of unusual items; Danielle calls with a lead about Hobo Jack.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Empire Picks Back : Mike and Frank use the force to unveil a secret Star Wars stash in California; the guys try to make a deal on a mint '56 Chevy Belair.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Coin-Op Kings : The guys find the ultimate coin-op man cave hidden on a farm in upstate New York; Frank devises a plan to help lonely collectors find love.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Virginia Is for Pickers : It's a picking blitz in Virginia as Mike, Frank, Robbie, and Danielle hit the road to leave no lead unturned.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The $90,000 Question : When they uncover one of the rarest motorcycles in the world, Mike and Frank must come up with more cash than ever before to try and seal the deal.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Raze the Roof : A Kentucky collector is eager to sell his stock before the roof of the building caves in; a pack rat in West Virginia wants to sell some of his collection.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Flying Fortress : What is supposed to be a vacation for Sonic, Manic and Sonia turns into a battle to save Mobius when Robotnik attacks with his newest weapon – the Flying Fortress.

programme.title: Sabrina The Animated Series
programme.desc: Xabrina Warrior Witch : Harvey is recruited to test a prototype of a new virtual reality game.

programme.title: Sabrina's Secret Life
programme.desc: Hot Item : While shopping with Sabrina, Maritza ogles a necklace that Cassandra buys. Knowing how much Maritza wants it, the unkind young witch uses it to taunt Maritza.

programme.title: Sabrina The Animated Series
programme.desc: Witchwrecked : It is field trip time as Sabrina’s class heads toward Monument Island where an important statue is kept.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Me Me Me! : Reluctantly preparing donations to the local museum for her father, whiny and self-centered Veronica gets a taste of her own medicine when she wishes everyone was like me.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Zombies of Love : Veronica doesn't think that Archie dotes on her enough, so she visits a witch woman who gives her a magic potion.

programme.title: Pee-Wee's Playhouse
programme.desc: The Cowboy and The Cowntess : Miss Yvonne asks Cowboy Curtis out for a date, which makes him nervous. Cowntess suggests playing date role-playing, with Pee-wee as Miss Yvonne.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Costume Party : Peppermint Fizz wants to exclude a new girl, Blueberry Muffin, because she’s 'different' – in the way she looks, lives, talks, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Playing to Beat the Band : Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear
programme.desc: Mr. Curry's Birthday Bash/ Paddington and the Loch Ness Monster/ Copybear : Mr. Curry has never had a birthday party, or so he says./ Paddington and the Nessie./ Paddington delivers papers to Mr. Brown's office.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear
programme.desc: Paddington Goes Underground/Paddington in the Ring /Mr. Curry Lets off Steam : On his first ride on the subway, a wandering Paddington experiences problems with a tricky escalator./While in Japan, Paddington visits a training school for novice sumos./Mr. Curry takes advantage of Paddington's good nature.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear
programme.desc: The Spy Who Loved Marmalade/Paddington at Wimbledon/Paddington in the Park : Paddington's suitcase is the center of a classic spy intrigue when it is switched./ Paddington accompanies Mr. Gruber to the famous tennis competition./ Paddington handles sound effects

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Zombies of Love : Veronica doesn't think that Archie dotes on her enough, so she visits a witch woman who gives her a magic potion.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Brain of Terror : Moose is close to being cut from the football team unless he is able to bring his grades up.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Mega-Mall of Horrors : One night, a bright, and glittering shopping mall mysteriously appears in Riverdale.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Twisted Youth : Archie and the gang get a taste of what it's like to deal with teenagers when Mr. Weatherbee, Mr. Lodge and Miss Grundy drink bottles of contaminated water, causing them to revert to their wild teenage selves.

programme.title: Sabrina The Animated Series
programme.desc: Driver Ed : When it seems like Hilda isn’t going to pass a test for her mortal driver’s license, Sabrina conjures up a cute driving instructor to help & inspire her.

programme.title: Sabrina's Secret Life
programme.desc: J’achoo : Down in the Netherworld, anticipation is building for a witch-specific holiday (like our Valentine’s Day or Halloween – like Mardi Gras, with everyone wearing masks).

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Movie Set : Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour (a M.A.D. agent in disguise), in a M.A.D. movie, Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into M.A.D.'s hands.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Meets The Grappler : Gadget is planning a trip on the Oriental Express Mystery Tour Train and is warned by Quimby about a MAD plot to kill him while aboard.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gone Went The Wind : Dr. Focus of M.A.D. invents a machine called Sneezooka which creates the wind of 3 billion sneezes. Inspector Gadget finds the secret laboratory and destroys the machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Great Wambini's Seance : Pets owned by the city's rich and famous are disappearing and Inspector Gadget's job is to investigate and locate the missing pets. MAD magician, the Great Wambini is inviting the missing pet owners to a siance.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Weather In Tibet : M.A.D. has invented a weather machine that controls the weather and is demanding money from cities. Inspector Gadget has to find and destroy the machine or else the cities will be buried in snow.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Birds Of A Feather : Inspector Gadget's mission is to foil Dr. Claw from stealing the Star of Instanbul.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Bad Dreams Are Made Of This : Dr. Claw, with the aid of Dr. Spectrum and Bert Sweetley, uses a dream beam to give the citizens of Metro City nightmares. His plan is to make everyone too tired to work, so they will buy his Dreamway machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Snakin' All Over : Inspector Gadget's mission is to guard a priceless coin collection from the evil clutches of M.A.D.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Bad Dreams Are Made Of This : Dr. Claw, with the aid of Dr. Spectrum and Bert Sweetley, uses a dream beam to give the citizens of Metro City nightmares. His plan is to make everyone too tired to work, so they will buy his Dreamway machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Boat : Inspector Gadget's undercover assignment takes place on a luxury liner where the wealthiest people in the world are on holiday. His mission is to prevent Dr. Claw from stealing their jewels.

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Cast Of One : Borzoi oh borzoi; Rod and Wads

programme.title: Blondie -- Live in London 2014
programme.desc: Blondie -- Live in London 2014 : Filmed at Roundhouse, London, giving all fans an experience; Blondie performs their hits including "Heart of Glass," "Euphoria," "Mile High" and many more.

programme.title: TINA TURNER - Rock Legends
programme.desc: TINA TURNER - Rock Legends : Journalists examine the life and music of Tina Turner, who rose to fame in the 1960s alongside then-husband Ike Turner, before enjoying a highly successful solo career.

programme.title: Johnny Cash - Music In Review
programme.desc: Johnny Cash - Music In Review : The film features rare archive interviews with Johnny and the reflections of a team of leading critics and working musicians, including 'Cowboy' Jack Clement and Bob Wooton and 'Fluke' Holland from The Tennessee Three.

programme.title: David Gilmour - Remember That Night
programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night : David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: James Brown : James Brown was an American singer, songwriter, record producer, dancer and bandleader. The founding father of funk music and a major figure of 20th century popular music and dance, he is often referred to as the Godfather of Soul.

programme.title: Aretha Franklin - Rock Legends
programme.desc: Aretha Franklin - Rock Legends : After a period at Columbia Records, Franklin signed to Atlantic Records in 1967, where she achieved her commercial acclaim and success with songs such as Respect, (You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman, Spanish Harlem and Think.

programme.title: Elton John: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Elton John: Live in London 2013 : Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

programme.title: Beyoncé - Sound of Change
programme.desc: Beyoncé - Sound of Change : The Sound Of Change was a benefit concert held at Twickenham Stadium, London, England, as part of the Chime For Change initiative, founded by Beyoncé with the help of actress Salma Hayek and Gucci's creative director, Frida Giannini.

programme.title: LL Cool J - Countdown Concert
programme.desc: LL Cool J - Countdown Concert : James Todd Smith III, best known by the stage name of LL Cool J, is an American hip-hop artist and actor. He is best known for his romantic ballads.

programme.title: Live at The Metro Theatre - Public Enemy
programme.desc: Live at The Metro Theatre - Public Enemy : Public Enemy, also known as PE, is an influential hip hop group from Long Island, New York, known for its politically charged lyrics, criticism of the media, and activism. Here, the group performs at The Metro Theatre, in Sydney, on Dec 27, 2008.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London
programme.desc: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London : Watch this production of Guns N' Roses performing live at the O2 Arena featuring hits; Paradise City, Sweet Child O' Mine, November Rain and many more.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Carried Away/Dueling Detectives! : Kate and Mei Lin are thrilled to tour the solar system with Pal's cousin, Dr. Yowl. Wally is missing and Elwood City's best detective is on the case. And that detective is…Binky?!?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter : Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Maria Speaks/Postcards from Binky : Maria has always been a silent fixture in Mr. Ratburn's third-grade class. But her time to speak has finally come. Can she fix her stutter? When Binky's grandparents miss his big soccer game, he decides to film a video reenactment.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing : Carl has agreed to play the accordion for George's puppet show. But his routines are getting in the way of rehearsals. Buster enlists Binky's help to keep him from gorging on delicious Tuvaluna cookies. Will Buster's self-control crumble?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie : When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's Secret Identity/Besties : Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2) : It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth : With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's Flights of Fancy/Cereal : Will Fern give up her dreams of being a writer just because of one silly rejection? Buster tells the story of a missing cereal box on his all-new podcast. Will he be able to find the thief--and in the process--the truth?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: He Said, He Said/Bunny Trouble : A special episode of Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur and friends try to remember what comes next. D.W. is excited to be taking care of the class bunny, Larry. But Larry is feeling adventurous and and wanders off.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma! : When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It : Arthur, Buster, and Brain are worried when Mr. Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what’s made him change? When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Prunella's Tent of Portent/Mutiny on the Pitch : At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List : Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky's "A" Game/Brain and the Time Capsule : When Binky gets an "A" on a test, Muffy and Francine are convinced he cheated. Is it possible that he actually studied? Brain makes a time capsule and gets overwhelmed by people asking to have their special belongings included.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Master Builders, Parts 1 & 2 : Buster struggles to build a birdhouse that will save the community garden from pests, while Muffy and Francine design a cat toy that will really change the pet toy game.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine and the Soccer Spy/Sue Ellen and the Last Page : When Ladonna befriends a new member of the Mighty Mountain soccer team, Francine becomes convinced she is leaking secret team info. The City Council has voted to close the Elwood City Library! Can Sue Ellen save it before it's too late?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy Misses Out/Arthur Takes a Stand : Muffy worries that her friends don't need her anymore when they plan a successful bake sale without her. Arthur thinks Mrs. MacGrady is being treated unfairly, so he decides the best to take a stand is to take a seat.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Take a Hike, Molly/Slink's Special Talent : When Rattles takes over Slink's paper route, Slink is determined to prove himself and earn his job back. When the Tough Customers go on a hike in the woods, Molly makes a few mistakes and has to apologize…but she refuses to!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Lost Dinosaur/The Princess Problem : It’s pretty hard to lose a dinosaur, but Rapty is missing! Can Bud be brave without his imaginary friend? D.W. loves the Princess Platoon series until she realizes that it doesn’t represent everyone.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Invasion of the Soccer Fans/Pal and the Big Itch : Kate appears to be hypnotized by the soccer game on the television! Can Pal, Amigo and Killer snap her out of her TV trance? Pal has to wear a cone and he takes advantage of his friends' special treatment, until it comes back to bite him.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn & The Special Someone/The Feud : Mr. Ratburn is getting married! Arthur can’t believe it. Teachers don’t have lives outside of school…do they? And Arthur and Buster get into an argument over a video game and pretty soon the entire third grade class chooses sides.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Rivals Came to Roost/The Longest Eleven Minutes : When Mighty Mountain’s school gets flooded, the Lakewood Elementary students have to share everything with them! The Internet is out! How will Muffy post to her blog?! How will Buster research aliens?! Looks like the most boring day ever.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy’s House Guests/Binky Can’t Always Get What He Wants : Muffy is terrified when peregrine falcons build a nest right outside her bedroom window. Can her friends help her cure her ornithophobia? Binky gets cast in a TV commercial and he’s certain his career as a superstar has begun.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy’s Car Campaign/Truth or Poll : Francine rallies the troops around a petition to help Lakewood Elementary protect the environment. Binky is convinced Mr. Ratburn’s math test was too hard, so Brain suggests he conduct a poll to find out what the rest of the class thinks.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fright Night/Citizen Cheikh : Buster’s Uncle Bob – portrayed by special guest R.L. Stine – comes to visit and tells Buster a spooky bedtime story. Then, Cheikh learns that he and his family will become American citizens!

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's Meet the Browns : Soon after losing her job, a single mother takes her brood to Georgia for her father's funeral and meets his uproarious clan for the first time.

programme.title: The Single Moms Club
programme.desc: The Single Moms Club : Brought together by their children's potential expulsion from school, diverse single mothers (Nia Long, Amy Smart, Cocoa Brown) form a support group to help one another overcome life's challenges.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Daddy's Little Girls
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's Daddy's Little Girls : An unexpected romance blooms between a struggling mechanic and the attorney who is representing him in a custody battle for his young daughters.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds : Romantic sparks fly between a wealthy businessman and a struggling single mother who works as a cleaner in his office building.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: Why Did I Get Married Too? : While on vacation in the Bahamas, the unexpected arrival of one's ex-husband causes some longtime friends to examine the strength of their own marriages.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Family That Preys
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's the Family That Preys : Secrets and scandals test the friendship of a wealthy socialite (Kathy Bates) and a working-class woman (Alfre Woodard), upsetting both their families.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Acrimony
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's Acrimony : A faithful wife who is tired of standing by her devious husband is enraged when it becomes clear she has been betrayed.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Tragic Takeoffs : An early-morning flight from Lexington, Ky. ends in disaster when a twin-engine jet careens off the tarmac.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Turboprop Terror : When a turboprop stalls and crashes into a North Carolina forest, investigators resort to a risky test flight-and uncover an industry-wide safety problem.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: 28 Seconds to Survive : When an alarm warns the pilots of Flight 518 that they are dangerously close to the ground, the aircraft suddenly smashes into a mountain.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Meltdown Over Kathmandu : Landing at one of the world's most challenging airports, a passenger plane comes in like a fighter jet, skids off the runway, and bursts into flames.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Scratching the Surface : After taking off from Taiwan, a China Airlines 747 suddenly disappears from radar and crashes, killing 225 people.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Disaster Runway : On July 17, 2007, TAM Airlines Flight 3054 slides off runway 35L at Congonhas Airport in São Paulo, Brazil, and crashes at high speed into a warehouse adjacent to a petrol station killing nearly 200 people.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Sabotage : From delusional hijackers to suicidal pilots, three flights fall victim to astonishing acts of sabotage.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Seconds From Touchdown : A turboprop aflame is just seconds from the tarmac in Montreal when it flips over and crashes to the ground.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: The Invisible Plane : SAS Flight 686 takes off from Milan's Linate Airport and moments later collides with a Cessna on the runway.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Engines Out : A look at how engine failures cause near-fatal accidents.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Sideswiped : A Boeing 737 leaving Panama City crashes into one of the most remote and treacherous jungles on the planet.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Falling to Pieces : On May 25, 1979, Flight 191 crashes into a trailer park moments after takeoff; 271 people aboard were killed.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Hudson River Runway : Shortly after take-off, US Airways Flight 1549 encounters a bird strike and lands on the Hudson River.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Peril Over Portugal : Martinair Flight 495, a DC-10, crashes when attempting to land at Portugal's Faro Airport amid thunderstorms and heavy rain.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: The Death of JFK Jr. : When John F. Kennedy Jr.'s Piper Saratoga crashed in 1999, the NTSB faces big pressure to find the wreckage and the cause.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Lemons into Lemonade : Amber takes Leah back-to-school shopping, Maci is apprehensive when Ryan resurfaces in Bentley's life, Farrah prepares Froco's grand opening, and Catelynn's mistake triggers dark thoughts.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Surprise Surprise! : Maci turns 25, Farrah deals with a challenging employee, Tyler celebrates Butch's important anniversary, and Matt's troubled son arrives as Amber tries to clear up nasty rumors.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Party in Portugal : Sam makes a big decision when the squad are told they're off to Portugal. The family live their best lives on the Algarve, but tension between Bethan, Beau and Abbie threatens to boil over. (S20, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Agg on the Algarve : Bethan and Abbie's row impacts on the house, and it all kicks off when Nat calls Bethan and Beau's relationship 'toxic'. The Geordie's get stuck into the Sangria and tear up the strip!

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Jason's Birthday : Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix : Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: 28 Days Later : Kelly struggles to adjust to life in rehab, and frequently calls home requesting various personal belongings.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Charity Case : Sharon and Kelly plan a trip to Kenya on behalf of a charity organization.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Ebony : A military brat from Colorado Springs, Ebony and her boyfriend Josh plan to join the Air Force after senior year. But the responsibilities of a new baby may keep them from enlisting, and maybe even from graduating.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Whitney : A southern belle from small town Georgia, Whitney is definitely the baby of the family. But with her mom pregnant as well, the house gets too crowded, and Whitney and her boyfriend must figure out how to move out.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Catelynn : 16 year-old Catelynn is the voice of reason in an otherwise hot-tempered family. With the support of her boyfriend Tyler, she's taking the biggest stand of her life and pursuing adoption without the approval of her parents.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: The Tipping Point : Farrah launches a new business, Ryan distances himself from Bentley and Larry on Father's Day, Amber decides to lose weight, and Tyler worries that Catelynn is resuming her unhealthy habits.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Mother's Day : Gary struggles as Leah spends more time with Amber, Catelynn readjusts to life after treatment, Farrah celebrates her 25th birthday in Miami, and Maci welcomes her newest family member.

programme.title: Ex on The Beach
programme.desc: Two for One Deal : Coffey finds herself in the middle of a Mark and Aubrey breakup. Mechie is torn between his Ex and his Next putting Ariana on edge. Two Exes are sent home at the Cut Ceremony.

programme.title: Disaster Date
programme.desc: Episode 18 : Wendy endures a love poem for her Mr. Romance date, Cody's blind date is a life coach who makes him want to head for the exit, and Victoria's date hooks up with two other girls in front of her.

programme.title: Disaster Date

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mike & Felicia : Mike and Felicia met online and soon hit it off. After agreeing to meet, Felicia stood Mike up, offering only thin excuses. Can Mike trust Felicia - or will he end up disappointed?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Rod & Ebony : Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jeff & Megan : After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nick & Melissa : Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brittany & Bryon : Brittany finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if the perfect military man is real. (S4, ep20)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chitara & Priscilla : Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: John & Kelsey : John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Bianca & Brogan : When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Aaliyah & Alicia : Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Prophet & Trinity : While Prophet, of Grammy-nominated Nappy Roots, is making his rap career comeback, he connected online with Trinity. Prophet's ready to settle down, but is this beauty too good to be true? (S4, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ayissha & Sydney : Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jesse & Brian : Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Artis & Jess : Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Falesha & Jacqueline : Falesha's name and pictures were stolen by a fake profile that nearly ruined her life. She thought her troubles were behind her, but four years later her past comes back to haunt her. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Sunny & Jamison : Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine & Mike : Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Felipe & Jasmine : Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate.

programme.desc: Kidiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, it's all about the kids! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the next generation by drinking some GO GO JUICE, getting caught up in TINY TORNADOS, and joining TYKE CLUB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: G-Eazy : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Gaten Matarazzo : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Stranger Things actor Gaten Matarazzo joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for a terrifying special episode as they witness PURE TERROR, get a TASTE OF THE GRAVE and try to avoid the DEMOGORGONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling LI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Happy Everything Episode : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Snowdiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Mark Cuban : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chick-ulousness : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Christina Milian : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Nerdiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Bro-diculousness : On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling LII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Mike Posner : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jordan Clarkson : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Waka Flocka Flame : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Keyshia Cole : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Highdiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rockdiculousness with Steel Panther : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: River Monsters: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Lethal Legends : Do underwater creatures with grasping hands stalk children in Japan; and is a murderous river spirit wreaking havoc on the Zambezi? Jeremy Wade investigates.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The Deadliest Encounters : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Sharks & Rays : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The Deadliest Catfish : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most frightening encounters with the world's deadliest catfish. What makes this type of fish so supremely dominant?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Untold Stories : Jeremy Wades shares untold tales and previously unseen footage from his many adventures.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Top Ten Beasts : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river. Armed with only old journals and his rod, Jeremy is on a mission to discover if monsters of the past still exist.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes, tackling an 11-foot black caiman and sitting alongside a 17-foot anaconda.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Torpedo : Jeremy travels to Central America to locate a man-sized beast that reportedly leaps into boats and inflicts devastating injuries upon fishermen.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Vampires of the Deep : Extreme angler Jeremy embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest to find an ancient river monster said to rise from the depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Amazon Titanic : Supreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to South America to hunt for a seriously gargantuan fish found in the dark depths of the Amazon River.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Invisible Killers : Jeremy has tracked down freshwater killers for 30 years, but now he's discovered that he was sharing those waters with darker, deadlier creatures - parasites.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls: Surviving the Island : When Bear returns to the Island to see the results of his experiment, he gets to see first hand how the men have been living for the past four weeks. He tours the camp reflects with them men on their personal approaches to surviving on The Island.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Shut Down : After a positive visit by Canadian Prime Minister Stephen Harper, Joe later clashes with Transport Canada inspectors threatening to shut down the airline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A Tale of Two Pilots : Tyler stunt flies for a visiting film crew, and Andrew breaks the news to Joe that he’s quitting to go to a bigger airline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Ice Jam : Joe helps out an old friend Ice Road Trucker Alex Debogorski. Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. Firebrand mechanic Chuck returns to the Buffalo hangar and immediately stirs the pot.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A Very Buffalo Christmas : It’s chaos at Buffalo when the Christmas toy run to the Arctic is plagued by breakdowns and the stress pushes Kelly past her breaking point.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Crash Landing : Electra captain Ray is forced to perform a dangerous emergency landing without one wheel when the plane’s right landing gear gets stuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: For Sale By Owner : When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready. But a landing gear emergency puts him and chief pilot Justin in serious danger.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Over Seas : Justin and Cory try to hoist a CL-215 water bomber sold to a Korean company onto a cargo ship – something no one has ever attempted.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Water Wings : In South Korea to meet the ship carrying the water bomber Buffalo is selling, tempers flare when Cory and Justin try to get the plane off the ship and delivered to its final destination.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Stuck In The Vending Vortex : Jessica Samko wins a bizarre carnival type attraction, but things go fowl, when she lands a side load of baby swans.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Goose Bumps in the Road : Samko reluctantly teams up with Jenn after Jenn bids way above her weight class.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The Silver Whining Playbook : Dusty's sensitive side is called on when he nets the job of transporting hundreds of live butterflies.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Smooth Sailin', Rough Ridin' : Marc is at the helm of relaunching a massive homemade houseboat but the family's history with the boat, and Marc's stormy attitude, threaten to sink the job before it ever reaches water

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Mini Golf And Massive Headaches : After winning a black light putt-putt golf course, Jenn's game is tested when she realizes that for her run, "MINI-golf" is a misnomer.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Power Rangers And Vampire Dangers : Jenn won't save the world, but she better make her deadline when she hauls a 16-foot-tall Power Ranger to a child's birthday party.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Big Pigs Fly, Little Pirates Cry : Jarrett learns the answer to the question, "Where does the world's largest hog sit?" (anywhere it wants), while hauling a shipment of epic proportions.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Up In Smoke And Going Broke : While shipping an 11-foot-tall glass water pipe to the Mile-High City, Marc tries to mellow out after a blown tire threatens to turn this shipment into shards.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: It's a Rock-A-Fire Implosion! : When tasked with hauling the old animatronic band, Rock-A-Fire Explosion, Jenn ends up pulling a Yoko Ono and almost cancels their reunion tour.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Fire and Rescue : After the delivery of sad family news, Jenn turns to Jarrett to take over an odd shipment.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Can't see the Sherwood Forrest for the Trees : Todd and Tamera struggle to fly straight after they discover their giant Robin Hood statue load is broken and Samko is bent to her limits when her load of trees is doubled.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Crying For Your Art : Jarrett literally drops a one-of-a-kind art piece while trying to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 1 : The young explorers are taught to survive in the wild, where they must make their own shelter.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 2 : On day two, the kids get a crash course in survival, from crossing dangerous terrain to learning how to use knives safely.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Down to the Wire : Shelby races to raise his rig before offshore storms force the end of the season; S&S and Collins cash in on the season's take; Gord rushes to deliver a season's profit to the mill in time; last minute gambles backfire at both Papac and Rygaard,.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: This Means War : Browning's crew gambles on a slipping skyline; Shelby puts his swamp buggy to the test; Craig mounts an assault to get rid of Dave; Joe Collins takes the plunge into the black waters of the Suwannee; Lemare receives devastating news.
